title: [codereview-pass3] spec/02a: select_channel and now() not defined; hash inconsistency in CCP-15.8.3
description: Pass 3: tx_with_mitigation calls undefined select_channel(ctx, metrics, now()). now() must be defined with cross-ref to draft-lichen-tdma:now(). Hash in slot selection must be consistent hash_32 (SipHash or similar) vs any crc16 mention in CCP-15.8.3. Update vectors for new cases. P2 correctness for interop. codereview-tagged. discovered-from:r80h,mq7a
